task_pools.display_name: MVP Compressed Air System Qualification Task Pool
source_limitations: Wave 2 expands task-pool source content only.
Duration references are provisional and require Wave 3 planning-basis coverage.
Document expectations require Wave 4 template bodies and Wave 5 schema/DCF coverage before product-ready output.
Task-pool source records do not authorize productization, deployment, SaaS readiness, customer-ready release, or M29.12 UAT acceptance.

tasks.title: Capture Compressed Air System change and scope context
tasks.purpose: Capture CCF/change context, utility boundary, GMP use, lifecycle route, and qualification path for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route

document_expectations.notes: Wave 2 validation fix: qualification plan expectation is explicitly represented at task-pool level; template/body/schema implementation remains Wave 4/Wave 5.

notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Confirm Compressed Air System requirements and design basis
tasks.purpose: Confirm user requirements, design basis, points of use/interface, vendor/engineering documents, and utility performance expectations for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Perform Compressed Air System RA/FMEA and impact assessment
tasks.purpose: Assess GMP impact, critical quality attributes, utility criticality, and testing/sampling depth for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Perform Compressed Air System DQ or design review
tasks.purpose: Confirm design suitability, capacity, distribution/interface expectations, and design qualification readiness for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Plan commissioning and turnover for Compressed Air System
tasks.purpose: Confirm CP, CTOP/A1/A2 or commissioning turnover evidence where applicable for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Prepare and execute Compressed Air System IQ
tasks.purpose: Verify installation, components, instruments, calibration, materials, distribution/interface evidence, and turnover readiness for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Prepare and execute Compressed Air System OQ
tasks.purpose: Verify operating ranges, alarms, controls, performance boundaries, and challenge conditions for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Prepare and execute Compressed Air System PQ/performance verification where applicable
tasks.purpose: Verify performance or operational evidence where scope requires for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Close Compressed Air System qualification package
tasks.purpose: Confirm deviations, CAPA, RTM, summary conclusions, and VSR readiness for Compressed Air System.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.
